claim: Always serialize timestamps in UTC to avoid cross-region comparison bugs
rationale: prior incidents with mixed local/UTC timestamps in order ledger

claim: OpenCode v1.14.48 project-level opencode.json does not accept a top-level 'permissions' key — schema validation rejects it
rationale: Ran opencode in dubaidiscounts project and got ConfigInvalidError: 'Unrecognized key: permissions'. The permissions field was valid in earlier versions (project was using @opencode-ai/plugin 1.14.30) but the current CLI (1.14.48) no longer allows it at the project level. Agentic-stack worked fine because it doesn't have a root opencode.json. Fix: remove the permissions key and define permissions per-agent using opencode agent config.
